summary: Tested two UI layout fixes on Bloom platform (Czech): (1) Messages page layout change from min-h-screen to calc(100dvh-60px) flex container, (2) Decorative dot (section-marker) added to 'Zprávy' and 'Můj profil' headings. All 7 required checks passed on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1280x800).
critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js L201: style='height: calc(-60px + 100dvh)' — React renders calc(100dvh - 60px) as calc(-60px + 100dvh), both are equivalent. Correct.
MessagesPage.js L206-207: h1 contains <span class='section-marker' style='background: #8A7CFF'/> — 10x10 purple dot visible before 'Zprávy'.
MessagesPage.js L210: grid div has classes 'grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 flex-1 min-h-0' with no inline height style — correctly fills remaining space.
ProfilePage.js L50-51: h1 contains <span class='section-marker' style='background: #8A7CFF'/> — 10x10 purple dot visible before 'Můj profil'.
seed_data_creation: One test message sent during chat functionality test ('Test msg mobile') in M._S._(Marťa) conversation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All layout fixes verified in iteration_46. Messages page uses calc(100dvh-60px) flex container (not min-h-screen). Grid uses flex-1 min-h-0 (no inline style). Both pages (/messages and /profile) show purple 10x10 section-marker dot before h1 title. Chat send functionality works on mobile (Enter key). Login: use page.type() not page.fill() and keyboard.press('Enter') to submit login form.
